context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Vault-seed-ready remains dry-run validated; Silo and DS public surfaces now prefer product-neutral names while retaining Refarm compatibility aliases.
current_tasks: Commit ff49cf9a makes @refarm.dev/silo resolve/provision provider-native GITHUB_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN keys with SILO_HOME preferred and REFARM_HOME fallback.
Commit 5e22f70d makes @refarm.dev/ds prefer data-ds-theme, --ds-*, .ds-*, data-ds-scroll-region, and @layer ds.* while retaining Refarm-prefixed compatibility aliases.
Validated DS naming slice with pnpm -C packages/ds run test, build, lint, git diff --check, and refarm agent finish after-edit/after-commit.
after-commit DS validation was full turbo cache hit for type-check/lint/build; avoid broad release dry-run until package metadata/files/exports/release policy changes.
next_actions: Continue pre-publication naming audit on remaining generic SDK/engine surfaces; prefer product-neutral API names unless Refarm branding is intentionally part of the CLI/app.
Do not repeat pnpm run release:vault-seed:check unless package metadata, files, exports, or release policy changes; latest 10-package dry-run already passed before the Silo/DS naming slices.
Treat stale runtime-agent session cleanup as separate operator-state work; avoid repeated sessions list/clear retries when the runtime is otherwise ready.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
